description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image, defines two stages (test and deploy), and sets a global variable NOKOGIRI_USE_SYSTEM_LIBRARIES=true. In the test stage add a build job that runs the before_script commands `rvm install 2.3.3` and `./script/setup.sh`, then executes `./script/build.sh` as its script, and caches both bundler (e.g., vendor/bundle) and pip (e.g., .cache/pip) directories. In the deploy stage add a rollbar_deploy job that runs `./script/rollbar.sh` and is limited to the master branch via a rules/only clause. Ensure the pipeline respects the caches and runs the deploy job only on master.
